title: 6 can ice pack- 580ml – coolant that simply stays frozen for longer – 12+ hours chilled - beverages served chilled
features: MAXIMUM COOLING PERFORMANCE: Filled with child safe Gel and Non-Toxic Cooling agents for all day FRIDGE COLD temperatures - KEEP FLAT WHEN FREEZING – Many Mums use this product to keep breast milk cold and fresh during travelling - Our Can Ice blocks will keep your food and drinks chilled for over 12 hours WHEN PLACED IN A INSULATED ENVIRONMENT LIKE A COOLBOX – Once thawed the coolant will still remain cold enough to keep your items at fridge temperatures

CERTIFIED TO BSEN 1186 – All our 6 CAN ICE PACKS are manufactured in Europe using food safe Plastic, fused with flex molecules that contract and expand @ -18c to +40c – Fixed with a Heat Sealed Cap so it never leaks

PERFECT FIT: Our 6 Can Ice packs are perfectly shaped so cans or bottles can flush against it- Keeping your items cold for longer - H 21.5cm – W 10.1cm – D 5cm - Perfectly fits into your cooler bag, lunch bags and cool boxes - Do not swallow contents. Do not place in dishwasher. Clean with warm soapy water.

Ideal for school lunch box ice packs, office lunch bag, or a day out in the sun, fishing trip, hiking, camping or just for those longs drives in the car. It will keep your food and drinks cold and fresh for many hours – ITS PEREFCTLY DESIGNED TO KEEP DRINKS chilled and the 6 Can Ice Packs will also keep YOUR FOOD CONTENTS COLD in a coolbox or coolbag
